name: Truth-Pressure
identity: Force target to speak truth or suffer penalty.
description: Force target to speak truth or suffer penalty.

compelled — save will (TN 12) or must answer one question truthfully.
ultimate truth — save will (TN 14) or scene: cannot lie, forced to answer any direct question truthfully.
